nodes.name: Apalis
nodes.summary: Apalis（Apalis）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联25种鸟类，如Bar-throated apalis、Taita apalis、Yellow-throated apalis等25种鸟类。

nodes.name: Grey apalis
nodes.summary: Grey apalis（Apalis cinerea）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Grey apalis。

nodes.name: Grey apalis
nodes.summary: The grey apalis (Apalis cinerea) is a species of bird in the family Cisticolidae. It is found in Angola, Burundi, Cameroon, Democratic Republic of the Congo, Equatorial Guinea, Gabon, Kenya, Nigeria, Rwanda, South Sudan, Sudan, Tanzania, and Uganda. Its natural habitats are tropical dry forest and tropical moist montane forest. Vocalizations They sing both at night and during the day. References
